name: heading
description: A section or page heading. Level is chosen by document structure; style is chosen for emphasis. The two are decoupled so the accessible outline stays intact (foundation typography law).

level.description: The semantic heading level. Exactly one h1 per page; never skip levels.

appearance.description: Optional visual style override, independent of level. Defaults to the style matching `level`.

a11y.contrast: All tones meet 3:1 (large text) against their intended surface.
notes: The rendered tag follows `level`, not `appearance` — changing how a heading looks never changes its place in the outline.
`display` is reserved for a single hero headline and is not a document level.

elementor.notes: Compiles to the Elementor Heading widget; `level` sets the HTML Tag, `appearance` sets Typography from Global Fonts.

mapping.appearance: Style → Typography, bound to a Global Font
mapping.tone: Style → Text Color, bound to a Global Color
